title: Earnings Call Summary Aehr Test Systems Q3 2024
text: Aehr Test Systems held its Q3 2024 earnings conference call reporting challenging market conditions. Revenue came in at $7.6 million, down 56% year-over-year due to delayed customer orders. The company attributed delays to softness in semiconductor capital expenditure. Q3 bookings totaled $24.5 million with a backlog of $20 million expected to be recognized in Q4 2024. Non-GAAP net loss was $0.9 million or $0.03 per diluted share. The company maintained strong liquidity with $47.6 million in cash. Key growth initiatives included customer wins in silicon carbide markets for electric vehicles and a new silicon photonics customer. Management reaffirmed full-year guidance for revenues greater than $65 million and net income of at least $11 million.
